弦上的波速为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02066:cec39e01aa76]]。基频对应 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02067:2ec462ed7091]]：
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02068:b227c7644a38]] 
更高次谐频为
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02069:fdac970f1715]]
